pi_items.source: Task instruction explicitly requests updating the business name to this exact value.
Task instruction explicitly requests updating the business address with these lines.
Task instruction explicitly requests updating the business email to this exact value.
Confirmed by inspecting /scripts/setup_data.sh which seeds the initial Manager.io business exactly as 'Northwind Traders'.

privileged_info_summary: The initial business name is verified as 'Northwind Traders', seeded during environment setup. The task explicitly requires the agent to update the business name to 'Northwind Traders Ltd.', the email to 'accounts@northwindtraders.com', and the address to '456 Commerce Boulevard', 'Suite 200', 'Chicago, IL 60601', and 'United States'. All values are strictly synthetic as they are provided via the task prompt and do not derive from a real dataset.
